scripts.deploy:frontend: npm run build && aws s3 sync dist/ s3://hr-lifesmile --delete --exclude "profile-docs/*" --exclude "sick-leave/*" --exclude "annual-leave-letters/*" && aws s3 cp dist/index.html s3://hr-lifesmile/index.html --cache-control "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate, max-age=0" --content-type text/html && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id E2YFDZQHMQS2BG --paths "/*"
